# Minimal top-level requirements for development (auto-generated + curated)
# Install these for normal development. For exact reproduction use requirements-pinned.txt
faster-whisper==1.0.3
Flask==3.1.3
Flask-Cors==4.0.0
groundingdino-py==0.4.0
numpy>=1.24.0
opencv-python==4.11.0.86
Pillow==11.3.0
transformers==5.5.0
requests==2.33.1
# Notes:
# - TTS is intentionally omitted from this minimal list due to numpy version constraints on some Python versions.
#   Install it separately if you need it: `python -m pip install TTS==0.22.0`
# - Torch/torchvision/torchaudio are platform/CUDA-specific. Install via the official PyTorch instructions.
#   Example (CPU): python -m pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu
